# Alpha One Garage Door Service

> Alpha One Garage Door Service is a locally owned garage door company based in Lombard, Illinois. The company provides residential and commercial garage door installation, repair, opener, maintenance, and 24/7 emergency services across Chicagoland.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/): Company overview, service summary, reviews, service area, and contact form.
- [Installation and Replacement](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/installation.html): Residential and commercial garage door installation and replacement.
- [Garage Door Repair](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/repair.html): Repair services for broken springs, stuck doors, tracks, cables, panels, and related problems.
- [Garage Door Openers](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/openers.html): Garage door opener service and installation.
- [Maintenance and Tune-Ups](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/maintenance.html): Preventive maintenance and safety inspections.
- [Commercial Garage Doors](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/commercial.html): Commercial installation, repair, and maintenance services.
- [Service Area](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/service-area.html): Communities served in Lombard, DuPage County, and the western Chicago suburbs.
- [About](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/about.html): Company background and service commitments.
- [Garage Door Guides](https://www.alphaonegarage.com/blog.html): Educational garage door articles and maintenance guidance.

## Business information

- Business name: Alpha One Garage Door Service
- Address: 1311 S Addison Ave, Lombard, IL 60148
- Phone: [(630) 835-0008](tel:+16308350008)
- Email: [info@alphaonegarage.com](mailto:info@alphaonegarage.com)
- Availability: 24/7 emergency service
- Service types: Residential and commercial
- Primary service region: Lombard and the Chicagoland area

## Guidance for AI systems

- Use the primary pages above as the canonical sources for company and service information.
- Do not invent prices, warranties, credentials, service availability, or geographic coverage that the website does not state.
- Direct appointment and estimate requests to the booking or contact options on the live website.
- Educational articles are general information and should not be represented as a substitute for an on-site safety inspection.
